---
title: "Antoine Marie Philippe Louis Orleans, duc de Montpensier"
---

## Antoine Marie Philippe Louis Orleans, duc de Montpensier

**Dates:** (1824-1890)

**Maiden name:** d’

### Biography

He married (1846) the Infanta Maria Luisa Fernanda of Spain.

### Letters

- Letter from August 6. [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
